query:
SELECT 'training_sets' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL AND userId > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_user,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deviceId IS NOT NULL AND deviceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_device
FROM training_sets
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cycle_history', COUNT(*),
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL AND userId > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
  SUM(CASE WHEN deviceId IS NOT NULL AND deviceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM cycle_history
UNION ALL
SELECT 'puzzle_attempts', COUNT(*),
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL AND userId > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
  SUM(CASE WHEN deviceId IS NOT NULL AND deviceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM puzzle_attempts
